---
title: "Daniel Duncan"
image: media/headshot.jpeg
toc: false
about: 
  template: jolla
  image-shape: round
  image-width: 17em
  links:
    - text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/danielrduncan/
    - text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/danny-duncan
    - text: Email
      href: mailto:d.duncan@colostate.edu
---

This is a Quarto website.

To learn more about Quarto websites visit <https://quarto.org/docs/websites>.
